proposed_relations.description: Both are B44 variants on the Nostrand Avenue/Rogers Avenue corridor in Brooklyn. B44 SBS is the Select Bus Service variant (proposed in this 2011 source), while B44 Local is the existing local bus service. They share the same base route (B44) and corridor but are distinct service variants.
